EmailTemplate.name: Booking Confirmed - Customer
EmailTemplate.subject: Booking Confirmation
EmailTemplate.textOnly:
Dear {!Booking__c.Primary_Applicant_Name__c},
This is with reference to your "Digital Booking form" for Unit:{!Project_Unit__c.RW_Param4__c} of Project: {!Project__c.Name}
We are happy to inform you that your Booking has been registered in our system and is under processing. You may call {!SMName} on {!SMPhoneNumber} for any assistance.
Regards, Runwal Group
